name: Classic Macaroni Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the egg salad, cooked macaroni, green pepper, mayonnaise, and pimientos.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. To serve, scoop about 3/4 cup of the salad onto a lettuce leaf.
5. Optionally sprinkle with paprika before serving.
Serves: 8
